THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELPING INTER DENOMINATIONS DESERVING ASSIST. INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANUEL, MICHAEL WASHINGTON, CAROLINE $1,979.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,024.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF LINDA STOCKDALE AND BANK OF AMERICA BRANCH # 269. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
